The '''Followers of Palawa''' were an ancient group that studied [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and [[Midi-chlorian/Legends|midi-chlorians]]. They fled their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Palawa]] to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bunduki/Legends|Bunduki]] after Palawa was destroyed in a long-ago war involving the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]].<ref name="JvS" />

The Followers of Palawa developed the martial art of [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]] as a means to keep the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in check, presumably so that another world would not be destroyed by the Jedi Council. They also mastered a [[Palawa hibernation trance|deep trance technique]] which they could use to sleep for decades without aging, somehow tapping into the Force through meditation.<ref name="JvS" /> During the [[First Great Schism]], many of the Followers, including [[Arden Lyn]], fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and joined the [[Legions of Lettow]].<ref name="Complete">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

The Followers were still in existence, as hermits, on Bunduki, in the years following the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Dux Pike's wife|mother]] of [[Zan Pike|Zan]] and [[Zu Pike]] placed her young daughters in their care during the first decade of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Shadows">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>
